sql_query.query: SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.name, u.reliability_score, m.payout_position, m.has_been_paid::int AS has_been_paid, m.role, (EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM contributions ct WHERE ct.circle_id = m.circle_id AND ct.user_id = u.id AND ct.cycle = (SELECT current_cycle FROM circles WHERE id = m.circle_id) AND ct.deleted_at IS NULL))::int AS paid_this_cycle FROM memberships m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.circle_id = $1 AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.payout_position ASC
